entry.data:
MOSTLY CLEAR THIS EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH THIS EVENING, BECOMING LIGHT AND VARIABLE

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING
SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS LIKELY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 70S

MOSTLY CLEAR
HOT
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 90S
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 105 IN THE AFTERNOON
